site.description: Specific identifier name (case-insensitive) that is associated with this ad unit and provided by RAS

area.description: Ad unit category name; only case-insensitive alphanumeric with underscores and hyphens are allowed

slot.description: Ad unit placement name (case-insensitive) provided by RAS

pageContext.dv.description: Document virtual address as slash-separated path that may consist of any number of parts (case-insensitive alphanumeric with underscores and hyphens); first part should be the same as site value and second as area value; next parts may reflect website navigation

pageContext.keyWords.description: List of keywords associated with this ad unit; only case-insensitive alphanumeric with underscores and hyphens are allowed

pageContext.keyValues.description: Key-values associated with this ad unit (case-insensitive); following characters are not allowed in the values: " ' = ! + # * ~ ; ^ ( ) < > ] [ & @
